regulations.name: EU AI Act
regulations.note: Phased application; high-risk (incl. medical devices) deferred per Digital Omnibus. Verify dates.

regulations.name: FDA QMSR (21 CFR 820)
regulations.note: QMSR aligns 21 CFR 820 with ISO 13485; effective 2 Feb 2026.

regulations.name: FDA Premarket Cybersecurity / FD&C Act 524B
regulations.note: Final premarket cybersecurity guidance; mandatory SBOM, postmarket plan, CVD. Verify latest on fda.gov.

regulations.name: EU Cyber Resilience Act
regulations.note: In force; main obligations ~Dec 2027. Verify phased dates.

regulations.name: NIST PQC Standards (FIPS 203/204/205)
regulations.note: ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA finalized; begin crypto-agility and migration planning.

regulations.name: EU GDPR
regulations.note: Lawful basis, data-subject rights, 72-hour breach notification, transfers.

regulations.name: HIPAA Security & Breach Notification Rules
regulations.note: Safeguards for ePHI + Breach Notification Rule. HHS proposed a Security Rule update (2025) - verify on hhs.gov.
